# Cipta Interior

Official website of Cipta Interior, a custom kitchen set manufacturer and interior design contractor serving Indonesia and international markets. Experienced since 2009 in residential, hotel, and commercial interior design.

## Core Information
- **Location**: Headquarters at Jl. Taruma Jaya, Setiamulya, Kec. Tarumajaya, Kab. Bekasi, Jawa Barat 17213.
- **Service Scope**: Domestic (all of Indonesia) and international clients.
- **Specialty**: Custom kitchen sets, residential interiors, custom furniture, hotel & commercial spaces.
- **Unique Selling Proposition**: Direct workshop production, free site survey & consultation for Indonesia-wide projects, 2-year warranty, global shipping & installation capability.

## Key Pages
- [/](https://ciptainterior.rf.gd/): Homepage with main brand details, project counters, and testimonials.
- [/about](https://ciptainterior.rf.gd/about): Company milestone history since 2009, core company values, and milestone timeline.
- [/services](https://ciptainterior.rf.gd/services): Information on custom services, pricing catalogs (Paket Dasar starting at Rp 15M, Paket Profesional starting at Rp 45M), and the 6-step project workflow.
- [/portofolio](https://ciptainterior.rf.gd/portofolio): Interactive portfolio gallery showing completed projects by category (residential, commercial, cafe/restaurant, hotel, and custom furniture).
- [/contact](https://ciptainterior.rf.gd/contact): Interactive workshop location map, operating hours, and official contact form.
- [/client](https://ciptainterior.rf.gd/client): Detailed client reviews, aggregate ratings (5/5 stars from 180+ clients), and partner logos.
- [/blog](https://ciptainterior.rf.gd/blog): Directory of static guide articles on kitchen set pricing, materials, and tropical home layouts.

## Key Resources
- [/blog/harga-kitchen-set-bekasi](https://ciptainterior.rf.gd/blog/harga-kitchen-set-bekasi): A detailed 2025 kitchen set budget estimation guide.
- [/blog/kitchen-set-minimalis](https://ciptainterior.rf.gd/blog/kitchen-set-minimalis): 10 tips for choosing minimal kitchen sets including layout guidelines and materials.
